proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 = 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009 = 1` lines had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in the rest of the cohort (n=5,574), a signed subgroup-vs-rest effect of -0.5552.

A systematic BRAF heterogeneity search over 120 one-predicate subgroups, 67,870 two-predicate subgroups, and targeted three-predicate extensions found that the dominant signal remained `feature_009 = 1`; small subgroups such as `feature_009 = 1` with high `feature_026` and high `feature_033` had similar, not meaningfully stronger, effects (effect -0.5554; n=387).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_022 = 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_022 = 1` lines had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in the rest of the cohort (n=3,880), for an effect of -0.3486.

The EGFR subgroup screen found the strongest dependency concentrated among `feature_022 = 1` lines, with modest additional enrichment in combinations such as low `feature_015`, high `feature_023`, and `feature_022 = 1` (mean -0.6714 versus -0.2775; n=245; effect -0.3939).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_024 = 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_024 = 1` lines had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in the rest of the cohort (n=4,890), for an effect of -0.4321.

The ERBB2 heterogeneity search retained `feature_024 = 1` as the primary driver. The strongest small subgroup was `feature_011 = breast`, high `feature_013`, and `feature_024 = 1`, with mean -0.7597 versus -0.2930 (n=292; effect -0.4667), a modest refinement relative to the main `feature_024` signal.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_014 = 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 = 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_014 = 1` lines had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in the rest of the cohort (n=11,842), for an effect of -0.3075.

The KRAS subgroup search found `feature_014 = 1` as the broad driver. High `feature_016` with low `feature_028` inside the `feature_014 = 1` group gave the strongest small subgroup (mean -0.6640 versus -0.3230; n=265; effect -0.3410), but the complete interpretable signal remained `feature_014 = 1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_027 = 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 = 0`.
Among cell lines with `feature_027 = 1`, the subgroup with `feature_011 = brain` has especially negative `dependency_RIT1` scores compared with all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_027 = 1` lines had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in the rest of the cohort (n=4,560), for an effect of -0.0955.
The RIT1 heterogeneity search found the strongest lineage refinement in `feature_011 = brain` and `feature_027 = 1` lines: mean -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in all others (n=329; effect -0.1397).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_011 = colorectal` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.

Cell lines with both `feature_011 = colorectal` and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 1.427`, approximately the 90th percentile) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011 = colorectal` lines had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in all other lines (n=5,816), for an effect of -0.4680.

Adding high `feature_028` sharply enriched the KIF18A dependency: `feature_011 = colorectal` and `feature_028 >= 1.427` had mean -1.0650 versus -0.2677 in the rest of the cohort (n=2,454; effect -0.7973).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The strongest `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is cell lines with `feature_011 = colorectal`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, `feature_020 = 0`, and `feature_035 = 1`, which have much more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: A targeted KIF18A refinement showed that the complete subgroup `feature_011 = colorectal`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, `feature_020 = 0`, and `feature_035 = 1` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.3952 versus -0.2678 in all other lines (n=1,732), effect -1.1274.

Threshold probing supported a monotone high-`feature_028` component within colorectal lines: the colorectal/high-`feature_028` subgroup effect strengthened from -0.6761 at the 75th percentile (`feature_028 >= 0.819`) to -0.7973 at the 90th percentile (`feature_028 >= 1.427`) and -0.8235 at the 95th percentile (`feature_028 >= 1.815`).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`, approximately the 90th percentile), especially with high `feature_026` (`feature_026 >= 1.153`), have more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: High `feature_016` alone was associated with more negative `dependency_TMED10`: mean -0.2906 versus -0.2499 (n=5,002; effect -0.0407).

The TMED10 heterogeneity screen found a stronger small subgroup with high `feature_016` and high `feature_026`: mean -0.3424 versus -0.2531 (n=490; effect -0.0893). The best three-predicate extension (`feature_004 = adherent`, high `feature_016`, high `feature_026`) had effect -0.1046.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) and high `feature_023` (`feature_023 >= 6.330`) have more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) have more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: For DHX9, high `feature_016` alone had effect -0.0433 and high `feature_023` alone had effect -0.0314; the joint high-`feature_016`/high-`feature_023` subgroup had mean -0.4174 versus -0.3327 (n=571; effect -0.0847).

For POLR2A, high `feature_016` had mean -0.5281 versus -0.4070 in other lines (n=5,002; effect -0.1211). The subgroup search found only modest refinements, such as high `feature_016` plus high `feature_026` with effect -0.1375.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with high `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 1.003`, approximately the 90th percentile) and high `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) have more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: High `feature_003` alone was associated with more negative `dependency_RPL11` (mean -0.3831 versus -0.2573; n=5,011; effect -0.1257), and `feature_018 = 1` also showed a strong effect (-0.1091).

The RPL11 heterogeneity search supported the high-`feature_003`/high-`feature_016` subgroup: mean -0.4193 versus -0.2677 (n=717; effect -0.1515). A smaller high-`feature_003`, high-`feature_016`-p75, high-`feature_033` subgroup had effect -0.1916, but the two-feature rule was more stable.
